science.schoolName: Learning Foundation and Performing Arts Gilbert
science.districtName: CAFA, Inc. dba Learning Foundation and Performing Arts Gilbert
science.subject: Science

narrative.headline: Science: not enough post-2020 data for a forecast
narrative.summarySentence: This school does not have enough numeric FAY All Students history to publish a trend forecast.
narrative.caveatSentence: Suppression or sparse history limits what can be inferred from the available assessment record.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

mathematics.schoolName: Learning Foundation and Performing Arts Gilbert
mathematics.districtName: CAFA, Inc. dba Learning Foundation and Performing Arts Gilbert
mathematics.subject: Mathematics

narrative.headline: Mathematics: stable or mixed
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students Mathematics percent passing changed by about -0.9 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2025. FY2026 indicator 11.0 with likely range 4.0-18.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

english-language-arts.schoolName: Learning Foundation and Performing Arts Gilbert
english-language-arts.districtName: CAFA, Inc. dba Learning Foundation and Performing Arts Gilbert
english-language-arts.subject: English Language Arts

narrative.headline: English Language Arts: stable or mixed
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students English Language Arts percent passing changed by about 1.5 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 33.0 with likely range 26.0-40.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.
